rationale: The proposed change to the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to §11.30, which governs exemptions for nonprofit water supply or wastewater service corporations. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 11.30. NONPROFIT WATER SUPPLY OR WASTEWATER SERVICE CORPORATION.
_note: Rule text concerns an entirely different exemption category; no interaction with the proposed homestead exemption increase.
